# Law Relating to the Protection of Personal Data and Privacy

Jurisdiction: Rwanda
Region: RW
Citation: Law No. 058/2021 relating to the protection of personal data and privacy
Authority: National Cyber Security Authority Rwanda
Source URL: https://www.nesa.gov.rw/index.php?eID=dumpFile&t=f&f=51728&token=0b428d401c0ff8302eb9fdf9011b680389a4ad2e
Topics: consent, notice_transparency, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, cross_border_transfer, security_breach
Keywords: Rwanda data protection law, personal data and privacy, NCSA

## Summary
Rwanda's personal data and privacy law with controller/processor duties, rights, sensitive data, transfers, and registration concepts.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide notices and lawful processing basis.
- Support rights and security safeguards.
- Assess registration and cross-border transfer duties.
